message:
feat(engine): add deep enrichment tests for regexp engine and checkpoint frontier

Add 173 new integration tests across two modules:

- regexp_deterministic_engine (98 tests): exhaustive AST node serde,
  NFA topology edge cases, CharRange boundary conditions, config edge
  values, flag combinations, lookahead/lookbehind, bounded quantifiers,
  cache stress, tail risk boundaries, error Display variants, receipt
  consistency, evidence inventory invariants, bundle I/O

- checkpoint_frontier (75 tests): sequence edge cases, 20-zone stress,
  recent ID trimming, determinism verification, epoch transitions,
  persistence failure recovery, quorum threshold validation, serde
  round-trips for all event types, Display exhaustiveness, linkage
  verification, cross-zone isolation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
